statement: In every magma, Equation 2358 (`x = (y * (y * (z * z))) * w`) implies Equation 177 (`x = (y * y) * (x * y)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0772
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z z))) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y y) (op x y))
